<blockquote>[[File:Pest fighter talent.gif|thumb|490x490px|PEST BUSTERS!]]Inflicts 1 point of damage to all nearby [https://minecraft.wiki/w/Silverfish Silverfish] at random ticks.


Increasing the skill level '''extends the range by 3 blocks.'''


Mastering the skill '''doubles the damage.'''</blockquote>

== Trivia ==

* It was added in the original DT
